name: Calm Emotions
description: Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere makes a Charisma saving throw or is affected by one of: Immunity to (and suppression of) the Charmed and Frightened conditions; or becoming Indifferent toward chosen creatures it's Hostile to. Engine: a failed CHA save applies the Calmed condition — the engine models the Indifferent outcome, so a becalmed creature makes no attacks for the duration. Ends with Concentration.
